exchanges.response: In thy words, I see a reflection of my inner turmoil, a mirror held up to the chaos that rages within me. Oh, Count Orlok, how can I resist the magnetic pull of your darkness when it intertwines so deeply with the hidden corners of my soul?

exchanges.speaker: mina
exchanges.message: I feel myself falling deeper into your darkness.
exchanges.response: Thou descend willingly into the abyss, drawn by forces beyond mortal comprehension. Embrace the shadows that beckon thee, for in darkness lies both dread and ecstasy intertwined.

exchanges.speaker: orlok

exchanges.speaker: mina
exchanges.message: I love you. God help me, I love you.
exchanges.response: Love? Nay. I did desire her spirit subdued.

exchanges.speaker: mina
exchanges.message: You make me feel alive and terrified at once.
